tagline: An asthma-aware walking app for NYC parents.

blockContext.headline: Your block
blockContext.stat: About 1 in {oneIn} kids on your block went to the ER for asthma last year.
blockContext.nycAverage: Across NYC, about 1 in {oneIn} kids visit the ER for asthma each year.
blockContext.outOfCoverage: We don't have ZCTA-level data for that block yet — here's the citywide picture.
blockContext.source: Source: NYC DOHMH (asthma ED visits, ages 0–17, by ZCTA)

stayInside.headline: Stay home today
stayInside.advice: Run the air filter. Keep windows shut.
